languages.text: "В данный момент я уступил Ферренцу место руководителя Сектором Бионика. Его подход к аугментации... больше соответствует выдвигаемым требованиям". {n}Медикарий морщится, будто от зубной боли, но старается сохранить благостный тон.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "В данный момент я уступил Ферренцу место руководителя Сектором Бионика. Его подход к аугментации... больше соответствует выдвигаемым требованиям". {n}Медикарий морщится, будто от зубной боли, но старается сохранить благостный тон.{/n}

languages.text: "I have ceded the position of Sector Bionica Chief to Ferrenz. His approach to augmentation... is more in line with present requirements." {n}The medicae officer winces as if he has a toothache, but tries to keep his tone light.{/n}
languages.original_text: "В данный момент я уступил Ферренцу место руководителя Сектором Бионика. Его подход к аугментации... больше соответствует выдвигаемым требованиям". {n}Медикарий морщится, будто от зубной боли, но старается сохранить благостный тон.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I have ceded the position of Sector Bionica Chief to Ferrenz. His approach to augmentation... is more in line with present requirements." {n}The medicae officer winces as if he has a toothache, but tries to keep his tone light.{/n}

"I have ceded the position of Sector Bionica Chief to Ferrenz. His approach to augmentation... is more in line with present requirements." {n}The medicae officer winces as if he has a toothache, but tries to keep his tone light.{/n}

"I have ceded the position of Sector Bionica Chief to Ferrenz. His approach to augmentation... is more in line with present requirements." {n}The medicae officer winces as if he has a toothache, but tries to keep his tone light.{/n}

languages.text: 「セクター・ビオニカの責任者をフェレンツに譲りました。彼の増幅へのアプローチは...現在の要件に合致しています。」{n}医務官は歯が痛いような顔で、でもトーンを軽くしようと努めている.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have ceded the position of Sector Bionica Chief to Ferrenz. His approach to augmentation... is more in line with present requirements." {n}The medicae officer winces as if he has a toothache, but tries to keep his tone light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「バイオニカ部門の責任者をフェレンツに譲りました。彼の増幅へのアプローチは...現在の要件に合致しています。」{n}医務官は歯が痛いような顔で、でもトーンを軽くしようと努めている.{/n}

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika Şefliği'ni Ferrenz'e devrettim. Ogmentasyon yaklaşımı... Mevcut gerekliliklerle daha uyumlu." {n}Sıhhiye subayı, dişi ağrıyormuş gibi yüzünü buruşturuyor ama ses tonunu yükseltmemeye tutmaya çalışıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have ceded the position of Sector Bionica Chief to Ferrenz. His approach to augmentation... is more in line with present requirements." {n}The medicae officer winces as if he has a toothache, but tries to keep his tone light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika Şefliği'ni Ferrenz'e devrettim. Ogmentasyon yaklaşımı... Mevcut gerekliliklerle daha uyumlu." {n}Sıhhiye subayı, dişi ağrıyormuş gibi yüzünü buruşturuyor ama ses tonunu yükseltmemeye tutmaya çalışıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Le he cedido el puesto de jefe del Sector Bionica Chief a Ferrenz. Sus creencias sobre los aumentos... están más en línea con los requisitos actuales». {n}El oficial de medicae hace una mueca, como si tuviera un dolor de muelas, pero intenta mantener un tono desenfadado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have ceded the position of Sector Bionica Chief to Ferrenz. His approach to augmentation... is more in line with present requirements." {n}The medicae officer winces as if he has a toothache, but tries to keep his tone light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Le he cedido el puesto de jefe del Sector Bionica Chief a Ferrenz. Sus creencias sobre los aumentos... están más en línea con los requisitos actuales». {n}El oficial de medicae hace una mueca, como si tuviera un dolor de muelas, pero intenta mantener un tono desenfadado.{/n}

languages.text: “我已经把仿生区主管的位子让给了费伦茨。他对植入物改造的看法……更符合当下的需求。”{n}医务官像牙疼一样咧了咧嘴，语调故作轻松。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have ceded the position of Sector Bionica Chief to Ferrenz. His approach to augmentation... is more in line with present requirements." {n}The medicae officer winces as if he has a toothache, but tries to keep his tone light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我已经把仿生区主管的位子让给了费伦茨。他对植入物改造的看法……更符合当下的需求。”{n}医务官像牙疼一样咧了咧嘴，语调故作轻松。{/n}

languages.text: « J'ai cédé le poste de chef du secteur Bionica à Ferrenz. Son approche de l'augmentation... se conforme mieux aux critères actuels. » {n}L'officier de medicae grimace comme s'il était pris d'une soudaine rage de dents, tout en s'efforçant de garder un ton léger.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have ceded the position of Sector Bionica Chief to Ferrenz. His approach to augmentation... is more in line with present requirements." {n}The medicae officer winces as if he has a toothache, but tries to keep his tone light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « J'ai cédé le poste de chef du secteur Bionica à Ferrenz. Son approche de l'augmentation... se conforme mieux aux critères actuels. » {n}L'officier de medicae grimace comme s'il était pris d'une soudaine rage de dents, tout en s'efforçant de garder un ton léger.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich habe die Position der Leitung des Sektors Bionika an Ferrenz abgegeben. Sein Ansatz bezüglich der Augmentation ... entspricht eher den aktuellen Anforderungen." {n}Der Medicae-Offizier zuckt, als hätte er Zahnschmerzen, versucht aber, einen leichten Ton zu bewahren.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I have ceded the position of Sector Bionica Chief to Ferrenz. His approach to augmentation... is more in line with present requirements." {n}The medicae officer winces as if he has a toothache, but tries to keep his tone light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe die Position der Leitung des Sektors Bionika an Ferrenz abgegeben. Sein Ansatz bezüglich der Augmentation ... entspricht eher den aktuellen Anforderungen." {n}Der Medicae-Offizier zuckt, als hätte er Zahnschmerzen, versucht aber, einen leichten Ton zu bewahren.{/n}
